title: Frying-pan Shield
description: This resource pack replaces the default shield with a 3D frying pan.
body:
# 🍳 Frying Pan Shield Resource Pack

![First Person Frying Pan!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Dr7GjyeV/images/541633ed00e430e4ebdf9686b6ec9715e702c2b6.png)

**Frying Pan Shield** is a lightweight and fun Minecraft resource pack that replaces the vanilla shield with a fully-modeled **frying pan**, adding a humorous twist to your combat experience without changing any game mechanics.

## 🌐 ITITAN Hosting
[![ITITAN Hosting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/3geETR/images/refs/heads/main/Other/ititan.png)](https://ititanhosting.com/game/minecraft)

## 💬 Feedback and Requests
If you have a suggestion or want a new funny reskin, feel free to contact us on Discord: **3geetr(Commander)** or **minecraftturkiye(Designer)**
